story.text: bdo asked to run the agents-launching-subagents admin 'on the books as a training program so to speak but ensure it gets monitored by some process.' The agents were already summoned on the rail (a governed, hash-pinned node prompt, gated by the requirements door), but their runs VANISHED: no receipt, nothing marking them training-not-production, nothing watching (R5/C6 of the agent-summoning requirements). This atom closes that: a training-run posture opened on the log (on the books), every agent run receipted and stamped under it (training: true, never auto-trusted as done), and a read-back fold as the monitor. It composes the recovered C1 (the tend-heal node prompt) and C3 (the prompt-requirements validator) into a witnessed loop. It also carries the governed issue-pen `create` verb: filing the feedback issues this work surfaced revealed that the issue pen could close/comment but not OPEN an issue, and raw `gh issue create` is now forbidden (#412) — so there was no governed way to file one. The create verb closes that gap (the same provenance shape as close/comment).

briefing.headline: agent runs on the books: a training-posture + monitor layer (loop/agent_run.py), plus the issue-pen create verb the gap required
briefing.value: loop/agent_run.py mirrors loop/train.py one axis over (train.py opens a security_mode posture and folds fence readings; this opens an agent_training_run posture and folds agent-run receipts). open_run/close_run admit the posture; book_receipt writes one agent_run receipt stamped training:true; fold_run is the monitor read (by node, by verdict, the actionable set, the governed prompt hashes used). tend-heal.js gains an Open phase (open the posture) and a Book phase (book each disposition under it), so every workflow agent is witnessed by construction. The issue pen (.claude/skills/issue/issue.py) gains a governed create verb (validate title/body/signer -> reach gh from Python -> append one issue.created provenance record), the open-side sibling of its close/comment.
briefing.why_now: bdo's direct ask (2026-06-22). The recovered C1/C3 were summoned right but unwitnessed; an off-the-books agent run is the exact thing R5/C6 names ('workflow agent runs leave no receipt - they vanish'). The training posture is the unlock that sidesteps the production-land deadlock: it asserts nothing as done, so it needs no confirm-arc to RUN, and its evidence later EARNS the realness stamp.
briefing.if_accepted: Agent runs become facts the loop can fold: a training posture on the log, every run receipted and attributable to its exact governed prompt, a monitor that reads it back. The first live monitored tend-heal run can fire once this is on main (the agents must see the code). And a session can OPEN a governed issue, not only close/comment one.
briefing.if_rejected: Workflow agent runs keep vanishing (unwitnessed, uncounted, untrusted-or-trusted-without-basis), and new issues can only be filed ungoverned (now: not at all, since raw gh issue create is forbidden).
briefing.cost_of_wrong_call: Low and bounded. agent_run.py is read-only but for two sanctioned appends (open a run, book a run), stdlib, no network; nothing it does advances a pipeline, clears a park, or settles a verdict (propose-grain, D-4). The issue-pen create verb mirrors the existing close/comment exactly. Reverting is deleting the module + the verb. The teeth are proven non-vacuous (see mechanism).
briefing.mechanism: loop/agent_run.py: book_receipt refuses a ghost node (no governed prompt) or a prompt_hash that is not the node's current governed hash - you cannot book an ungoverned run; fold_run reads back, an empty run folds to count 0 (no false all-clear). tests/test_agent_run.py proves all of it (ghost + mismatch REFUSED, idempotent re-book, empty != all-clear). issue.py do_create validates title/body/signer before any gh call and records only after gh succeeds; tests/test_issue_pen.py adds the create cases (number/url parsed from gh stdout, empty fields refused with no reach/record, no record when gh fails). Composes the recovered C1 (.ai-native/nodes/tend-heal.claude.v1.md) + C3 (loop/prompt_req.py, tests/test_prompt_req.py). Full suite green at 1401 before the issue-pen verb; issue-pen + prompt_req + agent_run focused suites green after.
